subject: Physics
question: What is the SI unit of force?
explanation: The SI unit of force is Newton (N), named after Sir Isaac Newton.
explanationA: Incorrect. Joule is the SI unit of energy or work.
explanationB: Incorrect. Watt is the SI unit of power.
explanationC: Correct! 1 Newton is the force required to accelerate a 1 kg mass by 1 m/s².
explanationD: Incorrect. Pascal is the SI unit of pressure.
